name: DANA
mission: DANA helps downtown neighbors understand what is changing, meet each other, and speak up for the place they call home.
paletteStatus: DANA green, crisp white, and a restrained gold accent.

membership.label: Live Downtown
membership.copy: For neighbors who want to meet people, get useful notes, and support a more livable downtown.

membership.label: Building Membership
membership.copy: For buildings that want residents to feel more connected to the neighborhood around them.

membership.label: Sponsorship
membership.copy: For local partners who want to help DANA show up well for downtown residents.
